name: Karna
overview: Karna, a gynaecologist, is forced into marriage with a pregnant woman who manipulates him for her own gain. As he battles his stepfamily, he finds solace and hope in Nidhi, his loyal friend and ally.

trailers.title: ತನ್ನವರ ಮಧ್ಯಾನೇ ಅನಾಥವಾಗಿರೋ ಮನೆ ಮಗನ ಕಥೆ!ಕರ್ಣ | ಅತೀ ಶೀಘ್ರದಲ್ಲಿ#Karna#KiranRaj#ComingSoon @zeekannada
